buyer: Product and engineering teams deploying a tool-using agent or coding automation
problem: The team cannot yet show which actions its agent may take, how failures are detected, or whether a behavior still holds after a change.
offer: A bounded assurance diagnostic for one real workflow: action-tier map, concrete failure cases, a reproducible check route, an adversarial test plan, and an operator handoff packet.
test: A qualified buyer reviews the proof packet and asks for a scoped diagnostic against one named workflow.
kill: If no qualified buyer asks for a scoped diagnostic by the due date, narrow the buyer/problem or retire this offer rather than asserting latent demand.
